sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this golf game

special_mechanics.name: Golf Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Ball trajectory and distance determined by player character selection (Pretty Amy/Eri has limited range with easiest control; Big Jumbo has best range with worst control; Miracle Chosuke and Super Mex have average attributes)

special_mechanics.name: Course Hazards
special_mechanics.description: Environmental obstacles affecting ball trajectory and shot selection: sand traps, water hazards, rough ground, and trees. US course features mostly bunkers and super rough; Japan course features water and tight boundaries

tier_notes: T3 empirical/qualitative tier. Source is Wikipedia article which provides game overview, character descriptions, and course information but contains no detailed physics parameters, movement values, or technical specifications. Game is a golf sports title, not a platformer or action game, so traditional movement parameters (jump velocity, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable.
